common.tagline: Book Your Mandi Slot, Sell Smarter

hero.subheadline: Skip the queue. Book your mandi slot in advance, check live crop prices, and get instant QR confirmation — all from your phone.

howItWorks.title: How MandiBook Works
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to book your mandi slot and sell your produce without waiting in long queues.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose from nearby mandis and pick a date that works for you.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Select an available slot, enter your crop details, and confirm your booking.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Arrive at the mandi, scan your QR code at the gate, and sell your produce hassle-free.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: A complete digital platform for farmers and mandi operations
features.slotBookingDesc: Book your mandi slot in advance — no more long queues or wasted trips.
features.livePricesDesc: Check real-time prices across mandis to get the best deal for your produce.
features.qrConfirmationDesc: Get instant QR code confirmation — scan at the gate for quick entry.
features.notificationsDesc: Receive booking reminders, price alerts, and important mandi updates.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about using MandiBook.
faq.q1: How do I book a mandi slot?
faq.a1: Simply sign in with your mobile number, select a mandi, choose a date and time slot, enter your crop details, and confirm. You'll receive an instant QR code.
faq.a2: Yes! MandiBook is completely free for farmers. There are no charges for booking slots or checking crop prices.
faq.q3: What if I need to cancel my booking?
faq.a3: You can cancel your booking up to 2 hours before your slot time from the 'My Bookings' section. The slot will be released for other farmers.
faq.a4: Crop prices are updated daily by mandi managers based on actual market rates. You can also view price trends over time.
faq.q5: Can I book slots at multiple mandis?
faq.a5: Yes, you can book slots at any registered mandi. However, overlapping time slots at different mandis are not allowed.

auth.otpSent: OTP sent to your mobile number
